verdict_reason: sign - OPPOSITE claim +, ATT=-24.79, p=0.0806, N=70, treated_countries=4
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED iff pooled CS-DiD ATT on above-ground biomass density (indigenous-managed minus matched controls, 2003-2023) >= +20% in relative terms AND the Australian-IPA subset ATT does not reverse sign relative to the pooled estimate. REFUTED if pooled ATT < +5% OR sign-flip in IPA subset. PARTIAL between +5% and +20%. METHOD_VALID requires parcel-level biomass series with at least 5,000 parcel-years per country and designation-date registry for at least 80% of treated parcels; failure emits inconclusive (data gap on noaa_viirs:above_ground_biomass).
